title: Write ferrum_extlib_imap.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_imap: IMAP4rev1 (RFC 3501) and IMAP4rev2 (RFC 9051). Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: client and server, mandatory RFC 9051 features (MOVE, STATUS=SIZE, LIST-STATUS, NAMESPACE), STARTTLS, folder management, message fetch/store, search, IDLE for push notifications, async integration.
